subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath caused the deaf to hear, guided the blind, and enabled the tongue to speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اسمع الصم و هدى العمى و انطق الیکم و اح
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
